scripts.daily-finlife-products: npm run fetch-finlife && npm run import-finlife && npm run update-products
scripts.daily-naver-products: npm run fetch-naver && npm run import-naver && npm run update-products
scripts.build: npm run update-products && node --test tests/*.test.js src/**/*.test.js scripts/*.test.js
scripts.lint: node --check src/lib/optimizer.js && node --check src/ui/app.js && node --check src/server/paid-access.js && node --check src/server/feedback.js && node --check server/app-server.js && node --check src/data/pipeline.js && node --check src/data/importer.js && node --check src/data/review.js && node --check src/data/adapters/fss-csv.js && node --check src/data/adapters/finlife-api.js && node --check src/data/adapters/naver-savings.js && node --check scripts/fetch-finlife-products.js && node --check scripts/import-finlife-products.js && node --check scripts/fetch-naver-products.js && node --check scripts/import-naver-products.js && node --check scripts/update-products.js && node --check scripts/import-fss-products.js && node --check scripts/review-products.js
